_field_documentation.id: Unique kebab-case slug for this sample
_field_documentation.category: Subdir name: capcut_desktop | capcut_mobile | jianying_legacy | modern_encrypted
_field_documentation.app_version: Semantic version string from the app's `new_version` field (e.g. '5.0.0'); null if unknown
_field_documentation.schema_version: Internal `version` integer from the draft JSON; null if unknown or encrypted
_field_documentation.timeline_entry_path: Path *relative to this manifest* pointing at the file to feed inspect/convert. Real-world samples often live outside the repo for privacy â€” in that case use source_app_path and leave this null.
_field_documentation.source_app_path: (optional) Original location on the contributor's machine; redact usernames as needed
_field_documentation.added: YYYY-MM-DD when this sample was added
_field_documentation.notes: Free-form: what was edited in this draft, why it's interesting, any quirks
_field_documentation.verified_against: (optional) cutsmith version+commit confirmed to convert this sample cleanly
_field_documentation.shape: (optional) Quick structural summary for triage: tracks, clips, durations, features exercised

Validates: P3 fix (V2.1 speed clip occupies target_dur=13.800s, not source_dur=8.833s, subsequent clips don't drift), P1 extra_refs categorization (every unsupported item has a specific category â€” no blanket extra_refs), name fallback (cutsmith2 not draft_info). Premiere import requires manual verification by user; the report's Time Remapping suggestion applies to V2.1 specifically.

samples.notes: v0.3.1 validation fixture. Key findings: (A) 1080Ă—1920 vertical preserved correctly. (B) 3 real speed changes (2.0Ă— + 0.5Ă— + 0.5Ă—) correctly detected as 'speed', 0 false-positive speed_curve â€” this sample triggered fix: _CONDITIONAL_REF_PREDICATES['speeds'] was erroneously reporting constant speed segments as speed_curve; fixed to only fire when curve_speed is not None. (C) sound_channel_mappings: 10 present but ALL benign (acm=0, is_config_open=False) â€” no active channel routing in this project; reader correctly filters them as benign, 0 false-positives. (D) 33 auto captions confirmed exportable via export-srt (33 cues, 39.97sâ€“100.0s range, correct target_timerange timing). (E) collect: 5 unique physical files copied (792MB), 5 deduped references â€” this sample triggered dedup fix: same 384MB video referenced 5Ă— was being copied 5Ă— before fix. 10 stickers offline (CapCut emoji cache not portable).
